privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task explicitly requires creating a report file at /home/ga/Documents/anonymity-verification.txt, navigating to check.torproject.org and its API endpoint, and creating a bookmark for check.torproject.org with the title 'Tor Connection Verifier'. These parameters exactly match the task description instructions and are enforced by the evaluation logic in export_result.sh and verifier.py. The task evaluates interactions with the real public internet (Tor network) rather than synthetic data.
